ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: Therapy-grade sudoku: 4x4 + 6x6 only with extra-large 30pt numerals, one puzzle per page, no clutter — most top-10 dump 9x9 (too hard for cognitive decline)

evergreen_baseline.evidence: Aging US population + memory-care market is structurally growing
